outcome of the proceedings. Accordingly, only one candidate, out 
of 31, became eligible for the interview, in terms of the order dated 
21.05.2024. The appellant did not obtain the minimum benchmark 
for SC/ST category i.e., securing 45 marks in each paper, and thus 
was not called for interview. However, this court vide order dated 
28.05.2024 in SLP(C) No.12179/2024, directed the appellant to 
appear for the interview for selection of Civil Judge (Jr. Division). 
Following this, the High Court of Madhya Pradesh preferred an
